## Evidencia de pruebas

- [ ] Gateway: pnpm --dir gateway lint
- [ ] Gateway: pnpm --dir gateway test
- [ ] Frontend: pnpm --dir frontend lint
- [ ] Frontend: pnpm --dir frontend build
- [ ] Python: ruff check shared/ services/
- [ ] Docker: docker compose config --quiet

## Checklist
